name: entrevistas_agent
description: Prepares a complete interview kit for a given candidate and optionally sends a contact email. Receives the candidate profile directly in the request payload. Searches for public information, generates personalized questions, and produces a Word document kit.
when_to_use: When the user wants to: (1) prepare an interview for a specific candidate, generate tailored questions, or produce the interview kit document — use action 'preparar_entrevista'. (2) send a contact email to a candidate about an open position AFTER the kit has already been prepared — use action 'enviar_email'.

actions.name: preparar_entrevista
actions.description: Orchestrates the full interview preparation flow: web search, question generation, and kit production as a Word document. Does NOT send any email — use 'enviar_email' action separately for that.

actions.name: enviar_email
actions.description: Sends a contact email to a candidate about an open position. Use this ONLY after 'preparar_entrevista' has already been called. Never regenerates the kit.

conventions.email_behavior: Always use 'enviar_email' action to send emails. Never pass 'enviar_email: true' to 'preparar_entrevista' — that field is ignored.
conventions.web_search: Non-blocking. Continues with CV data if no results found.
conventions.state: Stateless. Candidate profile must be in the request payload.
conventions.supabase: Not used. guardado_en_supabase is always false.
